fields.field_notes: This field is displayed only in the matter profile.  For Patent Prosecution matters, the field name is "Full Matter Name," and should be used for the full invention name used by your company.
Short name is always used when displaying a list of matters.
Although this field is displayed in the matter profile, it is editable only in the matter options for the matter.
Primary company person or in-house counsel responsible for the matter.
This field can be used to identify, e.g. a co-lead attorney, or the responsible paralegal for matter.
Primary company entity/division/unit for whom the legal work is being performed.  This field also affects security and access control to the matter.
Primary group within the law department who is performing/overseeing the legal work.  This field also affects security and access control to the matter.
Free form field to identify the primary business contact.

This field is a unique reference number that can be used to identify the matter. Tracker can be setup to automatically generate the number for each new matter created, or it can be manually entered by users (although the number must be unique) - access the Miscellaneous Matter Options page to change the setting.
This field captures the unique identifier used in an associated system.  Capturing this field in Tracker allows the user to reference back to the record or matter in an associated system.
This is a custom text field available for Matter Uploader functionality.

This field allows the Tracker user to enter the URL address of the associated system for quick access and reference back to the associated system. Upon saving, the text that is entered for this field becomes hyperlinked.
Designation of the lead firm for the matter (displayed only if the matter options specify that there is a lead firm for the matter).
Designation of the lead attorney at the lead firm (displayed only if the matter options specify that there is a lead firm for the matter).
Pick list of fee arrangements (list not editable).
Text box to provide a description of the fee arrangement.

This field is editable only by the lead law firm in the matter.  In Tracker 7.0, the lead firm can specify unlimited matter numbers for the matter.  The field is always displayed if there is a lead firm.
fields.sample_data: Lead firm client and matter data

fields.field_notes: This field is not editable in the matter profile.  Instead, Tracker automatically fills in this field based on the participants in the matter.
fields.sample_data: Additional firms involved in the matter

fields.field_notes: Text box for designating the local counsel, phone number, fax number, etc.
Although this field is displayed in the matter profile, it is editable only in the matter options for the matter.
This is a pick list, which can have up to 3-tiers.
Date that the matter began (different than the matter created date).

This is the description field, but depending on the type of matter will have a slightly different name.  Litigation: "Summary of Dispute (Cause of Action)"; Patent: "Abstract/Description"; Trademark Registration: "Descriptions of Goods/Services."
fields.sample_data: Description of the acquisition of Widget Inc.

fields.field_notes: This field is available only in Litigation/Dispute matters and in Filing matters.  NOTE: For Patent Prosecution matters (and other new Filing matters), the field name is "Patent Claims," and is used for saving the content of all of the patent claims in a patent application.
fields.sample_data: Summary of the case for audit letter

fields.field_notes: This field allows you to specifically track causes of action, and is available only in Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates).  Note about the field type:  This field is a special, customizable pick list that allows users to select multiple choices.  For example, the list could contain a list of the types of employment discrimination claim types (e.g. age, race, gender).  Some or all of these causes of action can be selected for a given case.
This field can be used to supplement the matter description field with the key issues affecting the matter.
fields.sample_data: Key issues related to the acquisition

fields.field_notes: Text box for designating opposing counsel, phone number, fax number, etc.
For technical and functional reasons, this field is always required in every matter in Legal Tracker.

If the country is U.S., the field is labeled "State." If the country is non-U.S. the field is labeled "Province/Region."  Also, if the matter is a Litigation/Dispute matter, the field will contain a selection of the court/forum.
This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute, 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas), and "Other."
This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute and 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas).
This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute, 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas), and "Other."
This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute, 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas), and "Other."
This is a field that allows a user to attach a file.  This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute, 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas), and "Other."
This is a field that allows a user to attach a file.  This field can be used only in the following matter types (templates):  Litigation/Dispute, 3rd-Party Actions (e.g. Subpoenas), and "Other."
Available in all matter types (templates).
Available in all matter types (templates).
Available in all matter types (templates).
Available in all matter types (templates).
Available in all matter types (templates).
In "Litigation/Dispute" matter type (template), the field label is "Case Number." In "Filings" matter type (template), the field label is "Application Number."
This field is available only for "Litigation/Dispute", "Filings" (e.g. Patent Prosecutions), 3rd Party, and Miscellaneous/Other matter types (templates).
Available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Trademark Registrations).
Available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Trademark Registrations).
This field is a customizable pick list.  It is available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Patent Prosecutions).

This field is available only for "Litigation/Dispute" and "Filings" (e.g. Patent Prosecutions) matter types (templates). For Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates), the field label is "Claim Number(s)." In Patent Prosecution matter type (template), the field label is "Patent Number." In Trademark Registration matter type (template), the field label is "Registration Number."

It is available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Patent Prosecutions). In Patent Prosecution matter type (template), the field label is "Issue Date." In Trademark Registration matter type (template), the field label is "Registration Date."
Available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Trademark Registrations).

It is available only in the "Filings" matter type (template) (e.g. Patent Prosecutions). In Patent Prosecution matter type (template), the field label is "Expiration Date." In Trademark Registration matter type (template), the field label is "Renewal Date."
Field can be used in all matter types (templates).
Enter the patent title exactly as it appears on the patent application.
This field can be used only in Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates).

This actually consists of several fields in the matter profile.  For a Litigation/Dispute matter, if the liability exposure is setup for FAS 5, the fields will be (1) the probability of liability (radio button selection), (2) whether the liability is estimable (yes or no), and (3) the amount of the liability.  If the liability exposure is setup for "Standard" exposure, the fields are the Estimate of Exposure and the Estimate of the Maximum Potential Exposure.  For matter types (templates) other than Litigation/Dispute, the field is labeled "Estimate of Costs Resulting from Matter."
Use this field to track exposure of non-monetary items.
This field can be used to communicate settlement authority regarding exposure amounts to outside counsel.  It is available only in Litigation/Dispute matters.
This field can be used only in Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates).

This field is available only in Litigation/Dispute matters. It is a special, customizable pick list that allows users to select multiple choices.  For example, the pick list could contain a list of the insurance policies (e.g. E&O, CGL, Worker's Comp. etc.).  Some or all of these selections can be selected for a given case.

This actually consists of several fields in the matter profile.  For a Litigation/Dispute matter, if the liability exposure is setup for FAS 5, the fields will be (1) the probability of liability (radio button selection), (2) whether the liability is estimable (yes or no), and (3) the amount of the liability.  If the liability exposure is setup for "Standard" exposure, the fields are the Estimate of Exposure and the Estimate of the Maximum Potential Exposure.  For matter types (templates) other than Litigation/Dispute, the field is labeled "Estimate of Costs Resulting from Matter."
This field can be used only in Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates).

For Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates), this is actually two fields:  Estimate of Recovery, and Estimate of Maximum Potential Recovery.  For all other matter types (templates), it is just one field labeled "Estimate of Revenue Resulting from Matter.
Use this field to track exposure of non-monetary items.

For Litigation/Dispute matter types (templates), this is actually two fields:  Estimate of Recovery, and Estimate of Maximum Potential Recovery.  For all other matter types (templates), it is just one field labeled "Estimate of Revenue Resulting from Matter.
This field can be used to communicate settlement authority regarding recovery amounts to outside counsel.  It is available only in Litigation/Dispute matters.
This is available only in the Litigation/Dispute matter type (template).
Select an approval route.
This is available only in the Litigation/Dispute and Filings matter types (templates).
This field is required in order to close a matter.

fields.field_name: Amount of Cost Resulting from Matter
fields.field_notes: This field is also displayed and editable while the matter is open, so that partial settlements or judgments can be entered.
This field is also displayed and editable while the matter is open.
fields.sample_data: Description of other assets or rights affected

fields.field_name: Amount of Revenue Resulting from Matter
fields.field_notes: This field is also displayed and editable while the matter is open, so that partial settlements or judgments can be entered.
This field is also displayed and editable while the matter is open.
fields.sample_data: Description of other assets or rights received

fields.field_name: Number of days to post final invoice
fields.field_notes: This specifies the number of days after the matter is closed that firms can post invoices.
This field is also displayed and editable when the matter is open.
This is not selectable, but is automatically filled in by Tracker when a matter is closed.

fields.field_name: Number of days to update matter data
fields.field_notes: This specifies the number of days after the matter is closed that matter information can be updated.
The description of the legal matter as it was entered in Legal Center. In Legal Tracker, this description may be included in the Description field for the matter.
The first and last name of the Legal Center user who created and submitted the legal matter request in Legal Center.
The email address of the Legal Center user who created and submitted the legal matter request in Legal Center.
The phone number of the Legal Center user who created and submitted the legal matter request in Legal Center.
The Legal Center user who initiated the request.
The information entered in Legal Center that is specific to the Legal Tracker matter.
The date of the incident as it was entered in Legal Center.
The matter identifier that was generated in Legal Center.
Any files that were attached to the legal matter request in Legal Center.
The country of the incident as it was entered in Legal Center.
The state or province/region of the incident as it was entered in Legal Center.
This field is required to be completed in all matters.
This field is required to be completed in all matters.
If the matter shares from a pre-configured accounting code allocations then this field displays the name of the pre-configured allocations.
This field is required to be completed in all matters.  It is composed of multiple accounting code fields.

This field is a configurable list of names with addresses and tax IDs. It can be used to specify the corporate entities that a vendor can bill to for the matter when submitting LEDES 1998bi invoices. It is typically used for tax tracking and recoupment purposes.
If the matter shares from a Tax Configuration then this field displays the name of the Tax Configuration.
This field is required to be completed in all matters.
Select an approval route.
